footer.desc: OPM: The Strongest — community database · data extracted directly from game

detail.noData: No data available for this section

corelab.title: Core Skill
corelab.desc: Calculate materials for Core Skill upgrades.
corelab.noResources: No level range selected for calculation.
corelab.noBuffs: No buffs unlocked in this level range.

mastery.title: Mastery
mastery.desc: Mastery System (Arena) — upgrade mechanics and costs.
mastery.materialsHint: Please select a tier range (From -> To) greater than 0 to view materials.
mastery.requirementsHint: Please select a tier range (From -> To) greater than 0 to view requirements.

backgear.title: Backgear
backgear.description: Scenic profile covers with real combat stats across their levels — {gears} covers and {sets} collection set.
backgear.characterPreview: Show a character on the cover
backgear.seniorNote: From L{level}, the cover switches to its upgraded artwork.
backgear.setDescription: Own a complete Backgear set to grant a team-wide bonus that scales with each cover's level and unlock a bonus cover.

equipment.keepsakeDesc: Browse character keepsakes and their acquisition sources.
equipment.insigniaDesc: Browse character insignias, ownership requirements, and acquisition sources.
equipment.keepsakeSourceUr: Obtain through the featured character event, limited shop, or keepsake-related event rewards.
equipment.keepsakeSource: Obtain from the character's related event or eligible event rewards.
equipment.insigniaSourceUr: Available after obtaining the character; acquire and upgrade it through Insignia-related events and shops.
equipment.insigniaSource: Available after obtaining the character; acquire it through eligible events and shops.
equipment.guideDailyRequestsDesc: Complete Daily Requests that reward Dragon or Demon Insignia shards.
equipment.guideRandomChestDesc: Open the box to randomly receive Tiger, B-Class, or C-Class Insignia shards.
equipment.guideRandomChestSource: How to obtain the Insignia Shard Box
equipment.guideRandomChestSourceDesc: Complete Daily Requests that reward an Insignia Shard Box. See the task and reward details in the images below.
equipment.guideClassAShopDesc: Purchase A Insignia shards from the Club Shop with the corresponding currency. Collect 50 shards to obtain one A Insignia.
equipment.guideDemonShopDesc: Demon Insignia shards may appear in the General Store and can be purchased with the corresponding currency.
equipment.guideBadgeChestDesc: Select one shard type: SS-Class, S-Class, Dragon, Outlaw, or Martial Artist.
equipment.guideMonthlyCardDesc: The monthly card provides an Insignia Shard Box for SS-Class, S-Class, Dragon, Outlaw, or Martial Artist shards.
equipment.guideUnavailableDesc: The current guide does not specify an acquisition source for this Insignia.

events.title: Event Schedule
events.desc: Track the game's event schedule. Click on an event to view details.
events.disclaimer: The event schedule below may not be completely accurate and is intended for reference purposes only.

medals.title: Emblem Feature
medals.desc: Unlocks at Level 70. Upgrade Emblems, Marks, inlay Gems, and activate Emblem Ultimate Skills to directly increase character power.

tactics.title: Tactics Feature
tactics.desc: Unlocks at Lv 75. Upgrade Tactic Cards based on type and faction. Challenge Crescent Tower to gather valuable tactics resources.
